description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by six matching wooden chairs, three on each of the longer sides. The table has a smooth, polished surface with a natural wood grain finish, and the legs are sturdy and straight, providing stable support. Each chair features a slatted backrest and a flat seat, designed for comfort and durability. The set is uniform in color, with a warm, medium-brown wood tone throughout. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments or carvings. This table and chair set is suitable for communal dining or gathering spaces, commonly found in homes, cafes, or public indoor environments.
description: A rectangular wooden dining table with six matching slatted-back chairs, all in a warm, polished wood finish. The set is simple, sturdy, and functional, ideal for communal indoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with three chairs on each side and one chair at the near end, highlighting the slatted backrest design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the table and the arrangement of three chairs on each side, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the opposite end chair in the foreground and the slatted backs of the far chairs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the table's length and the symmetrical chair arrangement.
